title: vitis vulpina var. cordifolia
intro: Vitis vulpina var. cordifolia, also known as the heart-leaf grapevine, is a variety of the fox grape vine native to eastern North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vitis vulpina var. cordifolia include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional herbal remedies.
